prompt: Transform the taskbar into a sleek, transparent glass design.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Transform the opaque, dark grey taskbar at the bottom of the screen into a sleek, transparent glass design. The new taskbar should appear clear, allowing the desktop background to be visible through it, achieving a modern, glassy aesthetic.
objects: desktop background (orange with blurred light circles)
desktop application icons (e.g., Blackjack, GIMP Image Editor)
sleek, transparent glass taskbar at the bottom of the screen
F-Spot application icon on the transparent taskbar
Internet - Dictionary application icon on the transparent taskbar
system tray icons on the transparent taskbar
start menu icon on the transparent taskbar
